title: Chalo Dilli
overview: Mihika, an investment banker, misses her flight to Delhi and meets Manu Gupta, a very talkative man. In order to reach Delhi on time, she must tag along with him on a road trip and put up with his antics.

trailers.title: Chalo Dilli (Uncut Theatrical Trailer) | Vinay Pathak | Lara Dutta.
